title: hedera helix var. walthamensis
intro: Hedera helix var. walthamensis, commonly known as Waltham Ivy, is a specific variety of English Ivy that is native to the United Kingdom. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hedera helix var. walthamensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol to extract the active compounds.
